homepage.meta_description: Pam Cox MP - Labour MP for Colchester. Find out about my work in Colchester and in Parliament, and how to contact me.
headings: h2: Secure jobs, fair pay new skills
h2: A local doctor and dentist when you need one
h2: Affordable, warm and sustainable homes
h2: Safer, cleaner streets and a crackdown on crime
h2: A vibrant city centre, heritage and green spaces
homepage.text_excerpt: --> Pam Cox MP | Labour Member of Parliament for Colchester top of page Home My story My pledges My latest My local work Contact me News More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. a local MP creating change Follow my work on social media Contact Me Colchester residents, contact me here First name * Last name * Address Post code * Email * Phone How can I help? Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter. Submit My Latest My story I’ve called Colchester home for over 20 years, raising my family here and serving the community as a city councillor. I’ve taught at the University of Essex and worked across public service, following the example of my parents who dedicated their lives to healthcare and ministry. ​ I’ve advised the Victims Commissioner, supported police and councils in tackling anti-social behaviour and violence against women, and helped develop services for vulnerable mothers - work that has since inspired national initiatives. ​ As a councillor since 2021, I’ve championed Colchester’s culture and heritage, supported community gardens and youth services, and worked to make our city more vibrant and inclusive. ​ Now, as your Member of Parliament, I’m focused on delivering real change for Colchester - making it an even better place to live, work, and enjoy. My Pledges To You 1. Secure jobs, fair pay and new skills 2. A local doctor and dentist when you need one 3. Affordable, warm, and sustainable homes 4. Safer, cleaner streets and a crackdown on crime 5. A vibrant city centre, heritage and green spaces Gallery My Work for Colchester A local MP creating change Secure jobs, fair pay new skills Up Bring more well-paid jobs to Colchester through new investment, training and skills Support Labour's 'new deal for working people' and fair pay agreements Better support for working parents Connect Colchester to regional growth hubs Labour will get Britain growing again - find out more A local doctor and dentist when you need one Up Better access to GPs, dentists and primary healthcare More evening and weekend appointments Support in-house provision of services at Colchester Hospital Labour will get the NHS back on its feet - find out more Affordable, warm and sustainable homes Up Build more council, social and affordable homes Better protections for private and social renters Government support for safe, warm homes fuelled by green energy Promote community energy to bring down bills Labour will switch on Great British Energy - find out more Safer, cleaner streets and a crackdown on crime Up More neighbourhood police and PCSOs New youth hubs Challenge the Essex 'Police, Fire and Crime Commissioner' to do more for Colchester Labour will take back our streets - find out more A vibrant city centre, heritage and green spaces Up Set up a 'High Street task force' to revitalise our historic city centre Protect our green spaces, river and country parks Reduce congestion and improve public transport Celebrate Colchester’s proud record as a welcoming and diverse city Make Colchester a great place to live, work and visit First name * Last name * Address Phone Email * Yes, subscribe me to your newsletter.
